summary: Convergence gate for derivation-heavy results: re-derive each atomic claim >=2 independent blind ways, reconcile by mathematical equivalence, iterate to convergence, emit a verification matrix.

install.claude_code: Link into ~/.claude/skills or install via marketplace when available. Executor 1 (fast, same-model) needs the Claude Code Workflow tool; Executor 2 (cross-model CLI) reuses the review-swarm skill's run_multi_task.py and works on any host.
install.codex: Link into ~/.codex/skills for Codex native discovery. Executor 2 (cross-model CLI) requires the review-swarm dependency; Executor 1 (Workflow) is Claude Code only.
install.opencode: Link into ~/.config/opencode/skills for OpenCode discovery. Executor 2 (cross-model CLI) requires the review-swarm dependency; Executor 1 (Workflow) is Claude Code only.
